blocks.label: Background
blocks.text: Born in the UK, raised across Switzerland and Turkey, shaping a global perspective early on and led to me being trilingual in English, Turkish and German. Currently studying Business and Management at Royal Holloway, with prior internships at Amazon and Spotify

blocks.label: What's next
blocks.text: Currently interning at Intel and will be joining Microsoft this summer to work within their MSAI team. Looking forward to learning more about Product Management

blocks.label: Hobbies
blocks.text: Hiking, climbing, photography, traveling and coffee

timeline.description: Incoming Product intern in the MSAI team
Worked on strategic growth for merchants.

Worked on AI features for users.
